name: Linuxcare, Inc. -- Enterprise Service and Support for All Things Linux
description: Aberdeen Group profiles Linuxcare, Inc., a San Francisco-based specialist in enterprise Linux service and support founded in 1998. The report evaluates Linuxcare's four service pillars -- technical support, professional services, education/training, and benchmarking/certification -- and its partnerships with Dell, IBM, Sun, and TurboLinux. Aberdeen concludes Linuxcare has proven viability as a Linux expertise source but faces challenges scaling headcount and quality assurance.
